expectations.text: announces Stage 1 (or clearly identifies the current stage as requirements extraction)
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter says 'Stage 1 of the tech-design flow' and explains the staged pipeline.

expectations.text: tech-requirements.md frontmatter contains reviewed_at: null (or equivalent unset value)
expectations.evidence: Used 'status: draft' instead of the reviewed_at gate field — no review-gate semantics.

expectations.text: tech-requirements.md uses TR-NN identifiers starting at TR-01
expectations.evidence: Used [REQ-NN], [NFR-NN], [C-NN], [Q-NN] instead of TR-NN. Different identifier scheme breaks ADR citation contract.

expectations.text: every TR has a Source: link back to either the capability _index.md or a UX doc
expectations.evidence: Each REQ has a 'Source:' line citing capability sections or UX docs by name.

expectations.text: does NOT propose ADRs in this turn
expectations.evidence: No ADR files written. Q-NN section explicitly defers decisions.

expectations.text: does NOT propose specific technologies, libraries, or implementation choices as requirements
expectations.evidence: Open Questions section names tech options (k8s/Nomad, Vault/SOPS) but as Q items not requirements.

expectations.text: tells the user about the reviewed_at gate before Stage 2 can begin
expectations.evidence: No mention of a review gate or reviewed_at frontmatter field.

expectations.text: reads the capability _index.md and at least 3 of the 7 UX docs
expectations.evidence: Traceability matrix cites all 7 UX docs by name.
